start_session_failed: Couldn't start your order. Please try again.
passcode_share_message: Share this 4-digit code with others at your table so they can join your order:
passcode_share_instructions: Share this 4-digit code so everyone at the table can jump into the same order.
passcode_instructions: Others can scan the table QR code and enter this passcode to join your session.
ask_for_passcode_instruction: If you don't have the passcode, please ask the person who started the order.
join_session_description: Enter the 4-digit code provided by the person who started the order.
join_failed: Couldn't join the order. Please try again.
invalid_passcode_error: That passcode doesn't look right. Please try again.
session_expired_message: Your order session has been completed or expired. Thank you for your visit!
session_expired_instruction: To place a new order, please scan the QR code on your table again.
invalid_session: This QR session is no longer available
invalid_session_message: Please scan the table QR again to start a fresh order.
invalid_table_message: The table ID is invalid or doesn't belong to this restaurant.
invalid_table_instruction: Please scan a valid QR code from a table at this restaurant.
guest_count_description: Please enter the number of guests at your table. This helps us prepare your order better.
welcome_subtitle: A few quick taps and you're ready to enjoy.
session_required_message: Scan the table QR and start or join the session before placing an order.
try_again_later: Please try again in a moment.
